name: Patelco Credit Union San Jose East
description_short: Patelco Credit Union San Jose East is a payday alternative lending provider based in San Jose, California. Rated 3.7/5 with 27 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Patelco Credit Union San Jose East is a payday alternative lending provider serving clients in San Jose, California. Carrying a 3.7/5.0 Google rating from 27 reviews, Patelco Credit Union San Jose East has an solid reputation among consumers in the San Jose area looking to find affordable alternatives to traditional payday loans.

Operating as a atm, bank, car finance and loan company, Patelco Credit Union San Jose East provides a range of services for consumers seeking payday alternative lending solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Payday alternative providers in San Jose offer consumers a way to access short-term funds without the high costs typically associated with traditional payday loans. Patelco Credit Union San Jose East operates in a space where regulation varies by state, and consumers should verify that any lender they work with is properly licensed. Key factors to compare include interest rates, loan limits, repayment terms, and whether the provider reports to credit bureaus.

Consumers in the San Jose, California area who are considering Patelco Credit Union San Jose East should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any payday alternative lending provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
